organisation.name: Pure Unity Health
organisation.overview: Pure Unity Health has been a leading NHS partner providing First Contact Practitioners and wider clinical services integrating with Primary Care since 2016.
organisation.missionFocus: Collaborative, community-based solutions integrating closely with Primary Care Networks, Neighbourhood teams, GP Federations and ICBs.

services.approach: Prevention-focused support to promote long-term wellbeing and health before illness develops.

careModel.description: Scalable, community-integrated care models optimising clinical pathways with data intelligence.

specialistPainServices.background: Extensive experience supporting MSK patients with persistent pain.

programmes.name: Primary Care Pain Support Service
programmes.targetGroup: Individuals attending primary care with persistent pain

serviceDesign.structure: Comprehensive modular pain service tailored to individual patient needs.
serviceDesign.aim: Facilitate long-term, meaningful change by addressing risk factors early.

philosophy.corePrinciple: Empowering individuals to take control and ownership of persistent pain management.
